arts.ttl: Inter v Como for 3 points under the Christmas tree
arts.sum: After losing their first home match against Como in Serie A (1-2 in May 1950), Inter have won each of their subsequent 12 home games against them in the tournament: the Nerazzurri could achieve 13 consecutive home wins against a single opponent for the first time in the top-flight (12 also against Fiorentina, between 2001 and 2013, and Pro Patria, between 1930 and 1955). Inter have won their last seven Serie A matches against Como, only against Pescara (eight) do the Nerazzurri have a longer open streak of consecutive victories in the tournament.

arts.ttl: Serie A | Inter v Como: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: As Inter Milan gears up to face Como in their upcoming Serie A fixture, manager Simone Inzaghi is set to recall his star players after rotating the squad in Thursday's match. The formidable attacking duo of Marcus Thuram and Lautaro Martinez is expected to lead the line, with Mehdi Taremi and Marko Arnautovic making way. arts.sum: Stefan De Vrij is experiencing a resurgence in form as he steps up to replace Francesco Acerbi in the Inter Milan defence. The Dutch defender has been delivering high-level performances, and although his contract is set to expire at the end of the season, he remains optimistic about his future with the club.
